program.name: Release Note Extractor
intake.purpose: Extract structured launch facts from a release note without inventing operational details.
intake.stages_json: [{"slug":"intake","is_bootstrap":true},{"slug":"release_note_summary","domain_spec":{"reads":["inputs.initial_user_text"],"produces":{"result_json":{"stage":"string","product":"string","version":"string","risk_level":"string","customer_action":"string","change_count":"number"},"items_json":["product:<product>","version:<version>","risk_level:<risk_level>","action:<customer_action>"]},"rules":["Extract product, version, risk_level, customer_action, and change_count from the release note text.","risk_level must come from an explicit risk statement in the release note.","customer_action must be an explicit action requested for customers, support, operators, or admins.","change_count counts the explicit product changes described before the risk statement.","Do not invent rollback, billing, or migration windows when the release note does not state them."],"invariants":["result_json.stage must equal release_note_summary.","product, version, risk_level, customer_action, and change_count must be top-level fields.","items_json must include product:<product>, version:<version>, risk_level:<risk_level>, and action:<customer_action>."]}},{"slug":"complete","is_terminal":true}]
